description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a sleek, rectangular form and rounded corners, featuring a glossy black finish. The front is dominated by a large, edge-to-edge display with a small notch at the top for the front-facing camera and sensors. The back panel is also black, displaying a dual-camera module and flash in the top left corner, a circular fingerprint sensor in the upper center, and a subtle 'mi' brand logo near the bottom. The sides are slim, with visible buttons on the right edge and a smooth, uninterrupted left edge. The device appears to be constructed primarily from glass and metal, giving it a premium look and feel. Its compact size and lightweight build make it suitable for handheld use in various urban environments.
description: A sleek, black smartphone with a large front display, dual rear cameras, and a fingerprint sensor on the back. The device features a glossy finish and minimalist design with subtle branding.
description_view_0: The left edge of the phone is visible, showing a slim, uninterrupted profile with no visible buttons or ports.
description_view_1: The front view displays the large, black screen with a small notch at the top for the front camera and sensors.
description_view_2: The right edge reveals the slim profile and the presence of physical buttons, likely for power and volume control.
description_view_3: The back view shows the dual camera module and flash in the top left, a circular fingerprint sensor in the upper center, and the 'mi' logo near the bottom.
attribute_brand_logo: A small, white 'mi' logo is centered near the bottom of the back panel.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen is completely black, indicating it is turned off or in standby mode with no visible content.
attribute_camera_placement: There are two camera lenses and a flash arranged horizontally in the top left corner of the back panel.
attribute_button_layout: Physical buttons are visible on the right edge, likely including a power button and volume rocker; no buttons are visible on the front or left edge.
